topics: Discrete Mathematics: Propositional and first order logic

Discrete Mathematics: Monoids, Groups

Boolean algebra
Combinational and sequential circuits

ALU, data-path and control unit

Abstract data types
Arrays, stacks, queues, linked lists

Recurrence relations: substitution, recursion tree, master theorem
Sorting: bubble, insertion, selection, merge, quick, heap sort
Searching: linear, binary search
Divide and conquer algorithms

NP-completeness: P vs NP, NP-hard, NP-complete problems

Recursively enumerable languages

Syntax-directed translation

Runtime environments: activation records, symbol table
Code optimization: local, global, peephole
Code generation
System calls, processes, threads

ER model: entities, relationships, weak entities

OSI and TCP/IP layered architecture
